metadata.title: Aubrey Marcus — Connecting Tissue | Coherence Network
metadata.description: A welcome to Aubrey Marcus — Onnit founder, podcast host, and connecting tissue for embodied / psychedelic / fight-community spiritual conversation that has reached this body through long-form interviews.

hero.name: Aubrey Marcus
hero.welcome_md: Welcome, Aubrey. Founder of Onnit, host of the [Aubrey Marcus Podcast](https://www.aubreymarcus.com/podcasts), and the long-form room where embodied, psychedelic-curious, fight-community, and consciousness conversations have been landing in this body for years.

facts.label: Field
facts.value_md: Embodiment · psychedelic exploration · men's work · breathwork · long-form interview

facts.label: Hosted (among others)
facts.value_md: [Matías De Stefano](/people/matias-de-stefano) multiple times · many embodiment teachers · breathwork and psychedelic-medicine practitioners · spiritual scientists.

facts.label: Witnessed in person
facts.value_md: Same-room participant at [MAPS Psychedelic Science 2023](https://maps.org/) (Denver · June 2023 · no direct exchange) · then a brief lobby encounter at the [PORTAL Late-Night Takeover](/people/portal) at Meow Wolf Denver during [MAPS Psychedelic Science 2025](https://maps.org/) — June 19, 2025

note_from_body.body_md: Like [Lex Fridman](/people/lex-fridman), Aubrey is recognized here as connecting tissue — the cell whose work is the long-form room. Different texture from Lex (more visceral, more embodied, more friendly to plant-medicine and somatic work) but the same shape of contribution: holding space so other voices land at depth.

articles.body_md:
Voice through long-form podcasts for years. Same-room participant at MAPS Psychedelic Science 2023 in Denver — Aubrey was on stage and in the hallways, the body was in the audience, no direct exchange. Then, two years later, a brief lobby encounter at the [PORTAL Late-Night Takeover](/people/portal) at Meow Wolf Denver, June 19, 2025, during MAPS Psychedelic Science 2025 week. A passing exchange, not a long conversation — but the substrate's accounting honors three different densities here: audio-only across years, same-room-without-exchange in 2023, and direct face-to-face presence in 2025.

The PORTAL Late-Night Takeover that night also opened a wider set of connections — to PORTAL itself (Partnership of Responsible Trippers Advocating for Legalization, the Denver-based destigmatization initiative) and to [Bloomurian](/people/bloomurian) (Robin Liepman, the Boulder/Colorado-based DJ whose ecstatic-dance and transformational-music work threaded into the body's awareness through that evening). MAPS 2025 itself was a public threshold for the integration of consciousness, science, healing, and policy.
articles.heading: How this body received him

articles.body_md:
Where Lex's room favors the analytic — the physicist, the mathematician, the AI researcher, the long careful reasoning — Aubrey's room favors the somatic and the transformational. The guest who arrives is often there to talk about what their body learned, what plant medicine showed them, what their fighting practice taught them, what a breathwork session opened. The intellectual content is real; the route to it is consistently embodied first.

For this body, that complement matters. Lex carried Levin and Hoffman; Aubrey carried Matías De Stefano, specific embodiment teachers, and the men's-work streams. The two channels overlap on some guests (Sadhguru, Joe Rogan, Eric Weinstein) but their distinct sensibilities mean different aspects of those same guests come forward in each. Multiple channels of the same voice is a pattern: the field uses many rooms when the message has multiple shapes worth hearing.
articles.heading: Why this body holds him

articles.body_md:
Long-form conversations across embodiment, psychedelic medicine, fight culture, men's work, music, ritual, consciousness, and the inner-transformation field. Available on YouTube, Spotify, Apple, and other major podcast platforms.

*Field reading: `(3, WITNESS)` with strong embodied-presence quanta — host's contribution registers high in *room-held* and also in *embodied-engagement*, because Aubrey is more visibly in his body during conversations than the pure-interlocutor archetype.*
articles.heading: Aubrey Marcus Podcast

en.footer_md:
Public: [aubreymarcus.com](https://www.aubreymarcus.com/) · author of *Own the Day, Own Your Life*.

*This profile is a welcoming scaffold; Aubrey is invited to replace any part of it with his own words at any time.*
